body:
angels1ut:

sexual tension is so hot to me.

imagine playful teasing over dinner and drinks. you’re slowly becoming frustrated - bratty, even. i let it slide for now, let you push back a little before i take the reigns again. your face flushes pink, partly in agitation and partly in response to the heat building in your stomach. then, you scoff and roll your eyes. “you’re so annoying.” hm, is that so? i lean over, close enough to hear your breath shudder as i trail my hand under your skirt. you swallow a gasp when my finger comes into contact with your wet panties. “yeah, that’s what i fucking thought,” i whisper in your ear before leaning back in my seat.

you’re so pretty when you’re flustered.
